cardSubtitle: Soft Neoprene Cosmetic Pouch with Custom Logo Options
logo: Printing (silk screen/heat transfer/hot stamping), embroidery, woven label, PU leather patch, silicone rubber patch, etal plate
application: Suitable for travel, home organization, cosmetic storage, toiletries storage, beauty product packaging, promotional gifts, and customized brand merchandise.
title: Custom Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Waterproof Makeup Pouch with Zipper
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Cosmetic Bag | Waterproof Makeup Bag Manufacturer
description:
Our neoprene cosmetic bag is designed for modern beauty storage needs, combining a stylish appearance with practical functionality. Made from high-quality neoprene material, this makeup pouch features a soft touch, lightweight structure, excellent durability, and water-resistant performance, making it an ideal choice for travel, daily organization, and beauty product storage.​
The flexible neoprene fabric provides gentle protection for cosmetics, skincare products, makeup brushes, and personal essentials, while the smooth zipper closure ensures convenient access and secure storage. Its compact yet spacious design helps keep beauty items organized and easy to carry in handbags, luggage, or backpacks.​
As a professional cosmetic bag manufacturer, Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd. provides OEM and ODM customization services, including customized sizes, colors, logo printing, patterns, materials, and packaging solutions. Whether for beauty brands, retailers, promotional campaigns, or corporate gifts, we can create customized neoprene makeup bags that match your brand requirements.
seoDescription: Discover high-quality neoprene cosmetic bags with waterproof, lightweight and durable designs. We provide custom makeup pouches, OEM/ODM services and wholesale solutions for global beauty brands and distributors.
